# MMSPartContent.MMSDispositionType.inline

**Case**

A disposition to render the content part in line with the rest of the message.

## Declaration

```swift
case inline
```

## Working with disposition types

- **MMSPartContent.MMSDispositionType.attachment**: A disposition to render the content part as an attachment to the message.
